title: poa angustifolia subsp. lejeunei
intro: Poa angustifolia subsp. lejeunei, also known as slender blue grass, is a subspecies of the Poa angustifolia plant, belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of slender blue grass include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antifungal properties. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
